# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.208.0/http/server.ts";

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

interface User {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  email: string;
  role: string;
  department: string;
  status: string;
  createdAt: string;
  tags?: string[];
  metadata?: Record<string, string>;
}

// Helper to build KV keys dynamically from user input
function buildKey(parts: string[]): Deno.KvKey {
  return parts.filter((p) => p !== undefined && p !== null && p !== "");
}

// Helper to parse search params into filter criteria
function parseFilters(
  params: URLSearchParams
): Record<string, string | string[]> {
  const filters: Record<string, string | string[]> = {};
  const excludeKeys = new Set(["limit", "offset", "sort", "order", "q"]);

  for (const [key, value] of params.entries()) {
    if (excludeKeys.has(key)) continue;
    if (filters[key]) {
      const existing = filters[key];
      if (Array.isArray(existing)) {
        existing.push(value);
      } else {
        filters[key] = [existing, value];
      }
    } else {
      filters[key] = value;
    }
  }
  return filters;
}

// Check if a user matches the given filters
function matchesFilters(
  user: User,
  filters: Record<string, string | string[]>,
  query?: string
): boolean {
  // Full-text search across all string fields
  if (query) {
    const lowerQuery = query.toLowerCase();
    const searchableFields = [
      user.name,
      user.email,
      user.role,
      user.department,
      user.status,
      ...(user.tags || []),
    ];
    const matches = searchableFields.some(
      (field) => field && field.toLowerCase().includes(lowerQuery)
    );
    if (!matches) return false;
  }

  // Apply individual field filters
  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(filters)) {
    const userValue = (user as Record<string, unknown>)[key];
    if (userValue === undefined) return false;

    if (Array.isArray(value)) {
      // OR matching: user field must match at least one of the filter values
      if (Array.isArray(userValue)) {
        const hasOverlap = value.some((v) =>
          (userValue as string[]).some(
            (uv) => uv.toLowerCase() === v.toLowerCase()
          )
        );
        if (!hasOverlap) return false;
      } else {
        const matches = value.some(
          (v) => String(userValue).toLowerCase() === v.toLowerCase()
        );
        if (!matches) return false;
      }
    } else {
      // Support wildcard prefix matching with *
      if (value.endsWith("*")) {
        const prefix = value.slice(0, -1).toLowerCase();
        if (!String(userValue).toLowerCase().startsWith(prefix)) return false;
      } else if (value.startsWith("!")) {
        // Negation filter
        const negated = value.slice(1).toLowerCase();
        if (String(userValue).toLowerCase() === negated) return false;
      } else if (Array.isArray(userValue)) {
        if (
          !(userValue as string[]).some(
            (uv) => uv.toLowerCase() === value.toLowerCase()
          )
        )
          return false;
      } else {
        if (String(userValue).toLowerCase() !== value.toLowerCase())
          return false;
      }
    }
  }
  return true;
}

// Seed some sample data for demonstration
async function seedData(): Promise<void> {
  const sampleUsers: User[] = [
    {
      id: "user-001",
      name: "Alice Johnson",
      email: "alice@example.com",
      role: "admin",
      department: "engineering",
      status: "active",
      createdAt: new Date("2024-01-15").toISOString(),
      tags: ["lead", "senior"],
      metadata: { location: "NYC", team: "platform" },
    },
    {
      id: "user-002",
      name: "Bob Smith",
      email: "bob@example.com",
      role: "developer",
      department: "engineering",
      status: "active",
      createdAt: new Date("2024-02-20").toISOString(),
      tags: ["junior", "frontend"],
      metadata: { location: "SF", team: "web" },
    },
    {
      id: "user-003",
      name: "Carol Davis",
      email: "carol@example.com",
      role: "designer",
      department: "design",
      status: "active",
      createdAt: new Date("2024-03-10").toISOString(),
      tags: ["senior", "ux"],
      metadata: { location: "NYC", team: "product" },
    },
    {
      id: "user-004",
      name: "Dave Wilson",
      email: "dave@example.com",
      role: "developer",
      department: "engineering",
      status: "inactive",
      createdAt: new Date("2023-11-05").toISOString(),
      tags: ["senior", "backend"],
      metadata: { location: "LA", team: "api" },
    },
    {
      id: "user-005",
      name: "Eve Martinez",
      email: "eve@example.com",
      role: "manager",
      department: "operations",
      status: "active",
      createdAt: new Date("2024-01-01").toISOString(),
      tags: ["lead"],
      metadata: { location: "NYC", team: "ops" },
    },
  ];

  const atomic = kv.atomic();
  for (const user of sampleUsers) {
    // Primary key: ['users', id]
    atomic.set(["users", user.id], user);
    // Secondary index: ['users_by_role', role, id]
    atomic.set(["users_by_role", user.role, user.id], user);
    // Secondary index: ['users_by_department', department, id]
    atomic.set(["users_by_department", user.department, user.id], user);
    // Secondary index: ['users_by_status', status, id]
    atomic.set(["users_by_status", user.status, user.id], user);
    // Secondary index: ['users_by_department_role', department, role, id]
    atomic.set(
      ["users_by_department_role", user.department, user.role, user.id],
      user
    );
    // Tag indices
    if (user.tags) {
      for (const tag of user.tags) {
        atomic.set(["users_by_tag", tag, user.id], user);
      }
    }
    // Metadata indices
    if (user.metadata) {
      for (const [metaKey, metaValue] of Object.entries(user.metadata)) {
        atomic.set(
          ["users_by_metadata", metaKey, metaValue, user.id],
          user
        );
      }
    }
  }
  await atomic.commit();
}

// Collect entries from a KV list iterator
async function collectEntries(
  prefix: Deno.KvKey,
  limit?: number
): Promise<User[]> {
  const results: User[] = [];
  const iter = kv.list<User>({ prefix }, { limit: limit || 1000 });
  for await (const entry of iter) {
    results.push(entry.value);
  }
  return results;
}

function jsonResponse(data: unknown, status = 200): Response {
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), {
    status,
    headers: {
      "Content-Type": "application/json",
      "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*",
      "Access-Control-Allow-Methods": "GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS",
      "Access-Control-Allow-Headers": "Content-Type",
    },
  });
}

function errorResponse(message: string, status = 400): Response {
  return jsonResponse({ error: message, status }, status);
}

async function handleRequest(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const path = url.pathname;
  const method = req.method;

  // CORS preflight
  if (method === "OPTIONS") {
    return new Response(null, {
      headers: {
        "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*",
        "Access-Control-Allow-Methods": "GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS",
        "Access-Control-Allow-Headers": "Content-Type",
      },
    });
  }

  // POST /api/seed - Seed sample data
  if (path === "/api/seed" && method === "POST") {
    await seedData();
    return jsonResponse({ message: "Sample data seeded successfully" });
  }

  // GET /api/users - List/search users with flexible filters
  if (path === "/api/users" && method === "GET") {
    const params = url.searchParams;
    const filters = parseFilters(params);
    const query = params.get("q") || undefined;
    const limit = parseInt(params.get("limit") || "50");
    const offset = parseInt(params.get("offset") || "0");
    const sortField = params.get("sort") || "createdAt";
    const sortOrder = params.get("order") || "desc";

    let users: User[];

    // Determine the most efficient KV key prefix to use
    const role = filters["role"];
    const department = filters["department"];
    const status = filters["status"];
    const tag = filters["tags"];

    if (
      department &&
      role &&
      !Array.isArray(department) &&
      !Array.isArray(role)
    ) {
      // Use composite index for department+role
      const key = buildKey([
        "users_by_department_role",
        department,
        role,
      ]);
      users = await collectEntries(key);
      // Remove used filters so they aren't double-checked
      delete filters["department"];
      delete filters["role"];
    } else if (role && !Array.isArray(role)) {
      const key = buildKey(["users_by_role", role]);
      users = await collectEntries(key);
      delete filters["role"];
    } else if (department && !Array.isArray(department)) {
      const key = buildKey(["users_by_department", department]);
      users = await collectEntries(key);
      delete filters["department"];
    } else if (status && !Array.isArray(status)) {
      const key = buildKey(["users_by_status", status]);
      users = await collectEntries(key);
      delete filters["status"];
    } else if (tag && !Array.isArray(tag)) {
      const key = buildKey(["users_by_tag", tag]);
      users = await collectEntries(key);
      delete filters["tags"];
    } else {
      // Fallback: scan all users
      users = await collectEntries(["users"]);
    }

    // Apply remaining filters and full-text search
    let filtered = users.filter((u) => matchesFilters(u, filters, query));

    // Sort
    filtered.sort((a, b) => {
      const aVal = (a as Record<string, unknown>)[sortField];
      const bVal = (b as Record<string, unknown>)[sortField];
      const aStr = String(aVal || "");
      const bStr = String(bVal || "");
      const cmp = aStr.localeCompare(bStr);
      return sortOrder === "asc" ? cmp : -cmp;
    });

    const total = filtered.length;
    const paginated = filtered.slice(offset, offset + limit);

    return jsonResponse({
      data: paginated,
      pagination: {
        total,
        limit,
        offset,
        hasMore: offset + limit < total,
      },
      filters: parseFilters(url.searchParams),
      query: query || null,
    });
  }

  // GET /api/users/:id - Get a single user by ID
  const userByIdMatch = path.match(/^\/api\/users\/([^/]+)$/);
  if (userByIdMatch && method === "GET") {
    const userId = userByIdMatch[1];
    const key = buildKey(["users", userId]);
    const entry = await kv.get<User>(key);
    if (!entry.value) {
      return errorResponse("User not found", 404);
    }
    return jsonResponse({ data: entry.value });
  }

  // GET /api/users/:id/:field - Get a specific field via dynamic key construction
  const userFieldMatch = path.match(/^\/api\/users\/([^/]+)\/([^/]+)$/);
  if (userFieldMatch && method === "GET") {
    const userId = userFieldMatch[1];
    const field = userFieldMatch[2];
    const key = buildKey(["users", userId]);
    const entry = await kv.get<User>(key);
    if (!entry.value) {
      return errorResponse("User not found", 404);
    }
    const user = entry.value as Record<string, unknown>;
    if (!(field in user)) {
      return errorResponse(`Field '${field}' not found on user`, 404);
    }
    return jsonResponse({ data: { [field]: user[field] } });
  }

  // POST /api/users - Create a new user
  if (path === "/api/users" && method === "POST") {
    const body = await req.json();
    const { name, email, role, department, status, tags, metadata } = body;

    if (!name || !email || !role || !department) {
      return errorResponse(
        "Missing required fields: name, email, role, department"
      );
    }

    const id = `user-${crypto.randomUUID().slice(0, 8)}`;
    const user: User = {
      id,
      name,
      email,
      role,
      department,
      status: status || "active",
      createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      tags: tags || [],
      metadata: metadata || {},
    };

    const atomic = kv.atomic();
    atomic.set(["users", id], user);
    atomic.set(["users_by_role", user.role, id], user);
    atomic.set(["users_by_department", user.department, id], user);
    atomic.set(["users_by_status", user.status, id], user);
    atomic.set(
      ["users_by_department_role", user.department, user.role, id],
      user
    );
    if (user.tags) {
      for (const tag of user.tags) {
        atomic.set(["users_by_tag", tag, id], user);
      }
    }
    if (user.metadata) {
      for (const [metaKey, metaValue] of Object.entries(user.metadata)) {
        atomic.set(["users_by_metadata", metaKey, metaValue, id], user);
      }
    }
    await atomic.commit();

    return jsonResponse({ data: user, message: "User created" }, 201);
  }

  // PUT /api/users/:id - Update a user
  if (userByIdMatch && method === "PUT") {
    const userId = userByIdMatch[1];
    const existing = await kv.get<User>(["users", userId]);
    if (!existing.value) {
      return errorResponse("User not found", 404);
    }

    const body = await req.json();
    const oldUser = existing.value;
    const updatedUser: User = { ...oldUser, ...body, id: userId };

    // Remove old indices and set new ones atomically
    const atomic = kv.atomic();

    // Remove old secondary indices
    atomic.delete(["users_by_role", oldUser.role, userId]);
    atomic.delete(["users_by_department", oldUser.department, userId]);
    atomic.delete(["users_by_status", oldUser.status, userId]);
    atomic.delete([
      "users_by_department_role",
      oldUser.department,
      oldUser.role,
      userId,
    ]);
    if (oldUser.tags) {
      for (const tag of oldUser.tags) {
        atomic.delete(["users_by_tag", tag, userId]);
      }
    }
    if (oldUser.metadata) {
      for (const [metaKey, metaValue] of Object.entries(oldUser.metadata)) {
        atomic.delete(["users_by_metadata", metaKey, metaValue, userId]);
      }
    }

    // Set new indices
    atomic.set(["users", userId], updatedUser);
    atomic.set(["users_by_role", updatedUser.role, userId], updatedUser);
    atomic.set(
      ["users_by_department", updatedUser.department, userId],
      updatedUser
    );
    atomic.set(
      ["users_by_status", updatedUser.status, userId],
      updatedUser
    );
    atomic.set(
      [
        "users_by_department_role",
        updatedUser.department,
        updatedUser.role,
        userId,
      ],
      updatedUser
    );
    if (updatedUser.tags) {
      for (const tag of updatedUser.tags) {
        atomic.set(["users_by_tag", tag, userId], updatedUser);
      }
    }
    if (updatedUser.metadata) {
      for (const [metaKey, metaValue] of Object.entries(
        updatedUser.metadata
      )) {
        atomic.set(
          ["users_by_metadata", metaKey, metaValue, userId],
          updatedUser
        );
      }
    }
    await atomic.commit();

    return jsonResponse({ data: updatedUser, message: "User updated" });
  }

  // DELETE /api/users/:id - Delete a user
  if (userByIdMatch && method === "DELETE") {
    const userId = userByIdMatch[1];
    const existing = await kv.get<User>(["users", userId]);
    if (!existing.value) {
      return errorResponse("User not found", 404);
    }

    const user = existing.value;
    const atomic = kv.atomic();
    atomic.delete(["users", userId]);
    atomic.delete(["users_by_role", user.role, userId]);
    atomic.delete(["users_by_department", user.department, userId]);
    atomic.delete(["users_by_status", user.status, userId]);
    atomic.delete([
      "users_by_department_role",
      user.department,
      user.role,
      userId,
    ]);
    if (user.tags) {
      for (const tag of user.tags) {
        atomic.delete(["users_by_tag", tag, userId]);
      }
    }
    if (user.metadata) {
      for (const [metaKey, metaValue] of Object.entries(user.metadata)) {
        atomic.delete(["users_by_metadata", metaKey, metaValue, userId]);
      }
    }
    await atomic.commit();

    return jsonResponse({ message: "User deleted", data: user });
  }

  // GET /api/search/metadata - Search by metadata key-value pairs
  if (path === "/api/search/metadata" && method === "GET") {
    const params = url.searchParams;
    const metaKey = params.get("key");
    const metaValue = params.get("value");
    const limit = parseInt(params.get("limit") || "50");

    if (!metaKey) {
      return errorResponse("Missing required parameter: key");
    }

    const keyParts = ["users_by_metadata", metaKey];
    if (metaValue) {
      keyParts.push(metaValue);
    }

    const key = buildKey(keyParts);
    const users = await collectEntries(key, limit);

    return jsonResponse({
      data: users,
      total: users.length,
      search: { key: metaKey, value: metaValue },
    });
  }

  // GET /api/search/tags - Search by tags
  if (path === "/api/search/tags" && method === "GET") {
    const params = url.searchParams;
    const tagsParam = params.getAll("tag");
    const limit = parseInt(params.get("limit") || "50");
    const matchAll = params.get("match") === "all";

    if (tagsParam.length === 0) {
      return errorResponse("Missing required parameter: tag");
    }

    if (tagsParam.length === 1) {
      const key = buildKey(["users_by_tag", tagsParam[0]]);
      const users = await collectEntries(key, limit);
      return jsonResponse({
        data: users,
        total: users.length,
        search: { tags: tagsParam },
      });
    }

    // Multiple tags: collect from each tag index and merge
    const userMaps = new Map<string, { user: User; count: number }>();

    for (const tag of tagsParam) {
      const key = buildKey(["users_by_tag", tag]);
      const users = await collectEntries(key);
      for (const user of users) {
        const existing = userMaps.get(user.id);
        if (existing) {
          existing.count++;
        } else {
          userMaps.set(user.id, { user, count: 1 });
        }
      }
    }

    let results: User[];
    if (matchAll) {
      // User must have ALL specified tags
      results = Array.from(userMaps.values())
        .filter((e) => e.count === tagsParam.length)
        .map((e) => e.user);
    } else {
      // User must have ANY of the specified tags (deduplicated)
      results = Array.from(userMaps.values()).map((e) => e.user);
    }

    return jsonResponse({
      data: results.slice(0, limit),
      total: results.length,
      search: { tags: tagsParam, matchAll },
    });
  }

  // GET /api/lookup - Dynamic key lookup from query params
  if (path === "/api/lookup" && method === "GET") {
    const params = url.searchParams;
    const keyParts = params.get("key");

    if (!keyParts) {
      return errorResponse(
        "Missing required parameter: key (comma-separated key parts)"
      );
    }

    const parts = keyParts.split(",").map((p) => p.trim());
    const key = buildKey(parts);
    const exact = params.get("exact") === "true";

    if (exact) {
      const entry = await kv.get<unknown>(key);
      if (!entry.value) {
        return errorResponse("Entry not found", 404);
      }
      return jsonResponse({ data: entry.value, key: parts });
    }

    // Prefix scan
    const limit = parseInt(params.get("limit") || "50");
    const results: Array<{ key: Deno.KvKey; value: unknown }> = [];
    const iter = kv.list<unknown>({ prefix: key }, { limit });
    for await (const entry of iter) {
      results.push({ key: entry.key, value: entry.value });
    }

    return jsonResponse({
      data: results,
      total: results.length,
      prefix: parts,
    });
  }

  // GET /api/stats - Get stats about the KV store
  if (path === "/api/stats" && method === "GET") {
    const totalUsers = (await collectEntries(["users"])).length;
    const roles = new Map<string, number>();
    const departments = new Map<string, number>();
    const statuses = new Map<string, number>();

    const users = await collectEntries(["users"]);
    for (const user of users) {
      roles.set(user.role, (roles.get(user.role) || 0) + 1);
      departments.set(
        user.department,
        (departments.get(user.department) || 0) + 1
      );
      statuses.set(user.status, (statuses.get(user.status) || 0) + 1);
    }

    return jsonResponse({
      totalUsers,
      byRole: Object.fromEntries(roles),
      byDepartment: Object.fromEntries(departments),
      byStatus: Object.fromEntries(statuses),
    });
  }

  // GET / - API documentation
  if (path === "/" && method === "GET") {
    return jsonResponse({
      name: "Edge Database API",
      version: "1.0.0",
      description:
        "Deno Deploy API with Deno KV for flexible data storage and search",
      endpoints: {
        "POST /api/seed": "Seed sample data",
        "GET /api/users":
          "List/search users with filters (role, department, status, tags, q for full-text, limit, offset, sort, order)",
        "GET /api/users/:id": "Get user by ID",
        "GET /api/users/:id/:field": "Get specific field of a user",
        "POST /api/users": "Create a new user",
        "PUT /api/users/:id": "Update a user",
        "DELETE /api/users/:id": "Delete a user",
        "GET /api/search/metadata":
          "Search by metadata (params: key, value)",
        "GET /api/search/tags":
          "Search by tags (params: tag, match=all for AND)",
        "GET /api/lookup":
          "Dynamic KV key lookup (params: key=comma,separated,parts, exact=true for exact match)",
        "GET /api/stats": "Get data statistics",
      },
      examples: {
        "Search active engineers":
          "/api/users?department=engineering&status=active",
        "Full-text search": "/api/users?q=alice",
        "Filter with negation": "/api/users?status=!inactive",
        "Filter with wildcard": "/api/users?name=A*",
        "Multi-value filter": "/api/users?role=admin&role=developer",
        "Search by tag": "/api/search/tags?tag=senior",
        "Search by multiple tags (AND)":
          "/api/search/tags?tag=senior&tag=backend&match=all",
        "Metadata search": "/api/search/metadata?key=location&value=NYC",
        "Dynamic key lookup": "/api/lookup?key=users_by_role,admin",
        "Paginated results": "/api/users?limit=10&offset=0&sort=name&order=asc",
      },
    });
  }

  return errorResponse("Not found", 404);
}

serve(handleRequest, { port: 8000 });
